title: ½ Speciedaler - Christian IV (Standing King type)

obverse.description: Crowned standing figure of King Christian IV in full armor. His left hand is on sword pommel, while his right is on a crowned shield standing on the ground at his right side. King's figure is inside a circle with legend outside. Mintmark at end of legend.
obverse.lettering_translation: King Christian IV, by the Grace of God King of Denmark and Norway, the Goths and the Wends
obverse.picture_copyright: Fritz Rudolf Künker GmbH & Co. KG, Osnabrück und Lübke + Wiedemann KG, Leonberg

reverse.description: Nude female figure representing Fortuna standing on globe, looking left and holding a long flying banner. The figure is within a beaded circle with legend outside. Date is at end of legend.
reverse.lettering_translation: New coin of the City of Gluckstadt
reverse.picture_copyright: Fritz Rudolf Künker GmbH & Co. KG, Osnabrück und Lübke + Wiedemann KG, Leonberg
